entity.summary: Automated market maker integrated with Euler credit vaults, providing swaps, quotes, pool creation, just-in-time vault-backed liquidity, shared cross-pool liquidity, configurable AMM curves, and registry-based pool discovery.
entity.notes: Official EulerSwap repository documentation identifies an AMM integrated with Euler credit vaults and documents direct swaps, exact-in/out helpers, quotes, liquidity limits, pool deployment, and pool registry behavior. The official repository received substantive EulerSwap documentation updates in January 2026, and the June 2026 DEX candidate source independently identifies EulerSwap as an active multichain DEX candidate. Confidence is medium because the main Euler website is broader than the EulerSwap product and a dedicated public trading frontend was not used as evidence in this record.

evidence.title: EulerSwap repository
evidence.notes: Official Euler organization repository identifies EulerSwap as an AMM integrated with Euler credit vaults and documents swaps, exact-in/out helpers, quotes, just-in-time liquidity, pool deployment, pool registry behavior, and configurable AMM mechanics.

evidence.title: EulerSwap collateral and debt documentation update
evidence.notes: Substantive first-party EulerSwap documentation update in January 2026 demonstrates continued maintenance of the EulerSwap codebase and AMM model documentation.

evidence.title: EulerSwap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: June 2026 DEX candidate corpus source identifies EulerSwap as a multichain DEX candidate, providing current registry corroboration alongside first-party protocol implementation evidence.
